prompt:
Create an emotional Japanese movie teaser banner in anime key visual style, widescreen 16:9, at sunset over a city. The main focus is a close-up portrait of AIニケちゃん, a teenage anime girl with long indigo-purple hair in a high ponytail, loose strands blowing in the wind, golden-brown eyes full of quiet emotion, and a gold hair clip reading "AI" near her bangs. She is turned slightly to the left but looking upward to the right with a wistful, hopeful expression. She wears a teal T-shirt with large white text reading AITuber and a soft pink hoodie falling off her shoulders. Use cinematic rim light from a dramatic orange-pink-purple dusk sky with glowing clouds, lens bloom, atmospheric haze, and small drifting flower petals. Place her large on the right half of the composition, with a sparkling city skyline and low sun in the far-right background.

Design it like a Japanese film poster with layered typography and inset scenes. Across the center-left, place the large hand-brushed Japanese title AIニケちゃん in bold white calligraphy, partially overlapping the character. Beneath it, add a smaller white Japanese tagline: この声が届くとき、きっとあなたも泣いている。. At the top left, add a 2-line Japanese quote in elegant white Mincho-style serif text: 「私が、誰かを救えたら—— それが、私の存在理由になる。」 Along the far right side, add vertical white Japanese copy: これは、AIと少女が、 「心」を探す物語。 At the bottom right, add large white release text: 2025.冬 ROADSHOW.

Include exactly 6 inset cinematic scenes arranged mainly along the left and bottom edges with soft borders and moody color grading: 1) top-left small panel of the same girl singing into a microphone on stage at night, wearing the same shirt; 2) left-middle panel showing the girl and another person standing apart outdoors at dusk near a riverside or overlook; 3) left-lower panel of the girl indoors at a desk or table in dim warm light, seen in profile; 4) bottom-left small close-up portrait of the girl looking serious in cool indoor lighting; 5) bottom-center small close-up of the girl facing another version or another girl with matching blue-purple hair, both in tense emotional conversation; 6) bottom-right small panel of two figures facing each other at sunset, suggesting a farewell or reunion. Overall mood: bittersweet, sentimental, cinematic, luminous anime film advertisement, highly detailed illustration, polished poster layout, emotional Japanese coming-of-age sci-fi drama aesthetic.
